name: claudetailor
description: AI-driven context provisioning engine for Claude Code — Stop context bloat. Let AI pick what it needs.

metadata.description: Just-In-Time Context provisioning for Claude Code

plugins.name: claudetailor
plugins.description: ClaudeTailor is an AI-driven context provisioning engine that dynamically builds minimal Claude Code project environments based on your development requirements. Stop context bloat — let AI cherry-pick only what it needs from your context pool.
